name: iQSTEL Inc
business: IQSTEL Inc. is a technology company with operations in 20 countries offering services in telecommunications, fintech, and AI-enhanced industries. Its Telecom Division provides VoIP, SMS, IoT solutions, and international fiber-optic connectivity to telecom carriers and enterprises. The Fintech and AI divisions offer digital gift cards, remittances, debit cards, and AI software for enterprise and telecom applications.
namedCustomers: Sistemas Satelitales de Colombia S.A. Esp

exposures.sentence: Our Telecom Division, which represents the majority of current operations and accounted for 91% of our revenues for the year ended December 31, 2025, offers Voice over Internet Protocol (VoIP), SMS, proprietary Internet of Things (IoT) solutions, and international fiber-optic connectivity through its subsidiaries: Etelix (www.etelix.com), SwissLink Carrier (www.swisslink-carrier.com), Smartbiz Telecom (www.smartbiztel.com), Whisl Telecom (www.whisl.com), IoT Labs (www.iotlabs.mx), QGlobal SMS (www.qglobalsms.com), and QXTEL Limited (www.qxtel.com).

The Company s developing Fintech Business Line offers a complete Fintech ecosystem including a MasterCard Debit Card, US Bank Account (No SSN Needed), and a Mobile App/Wallet for remittances and mobile top-up services.
Reality Border now develops practical AI software solutions for enterprise and telecommunications applications.

Also under the Telecom Division, our developing Blockchain Platform Business Line offers our proprietary Mobile Number Portability Application (MNPA) through our subsidiary, itsBchain (www.itsbchain.com).

Security breaches, denial of service attacks, or other hacking and phishing attacks on our systems or other security breaches, including internal security failures, could harm our reputation or subject us to significant liability, and adversely affect our business and financial results.

tamClaims.claim: The Global A2P SMS Market is expected to grow at a CAGR of 4.1% to account for $101 billion in 2030.
tamClaims.sentence: The Global A2P SMS Market is expected to grow at a CAGR of 4.1% to account for $101 billion in 2030, according to Transparency Market Research.

tamClaims.claim: Remittances to low- and middle-income countries approached nearly $700 billion in 2025.
tamClaims.sentence: According to recent estimates from the World Bank, remittances to low- and middle-income countries continued their upward trajectory, approaching nearly $700 billion in 2025.

tamClaims.claim: The number portability market in the countries under analysis is estimated at over $86 million per year.
tamClaims.sentence: In terms of dollar value, the number portability market in the countries under our analysis is estimated at over $86 million per year.
